message:
feat(tests): add comprehensive daemon stress tests

Add daemon_stress.rs with 9 stress tests covering:
- Concurrent embed requests (20 concurrent)
- Barrier-synchronized concurrent requests
- In-flight limit awareness (50 concurrent)
- Sequential resource leak testing (500 requests)
- Concurrent resource leak testing (200 in batches)
- Rapid connection cycles (50 cycles)
- Status reflection of activity
- Sustained load (5 seconds continuous)
- Burst after idle period (30 concurrent)

Closes:
- bd-31l8: Concurrent request and stress tests
- bd-15k9: E2E shell test script (already complete)
- bd-p4vs: Unit and integration tests for daemon
- bd-31z: Warm Model Daemon Architecture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
